textByHash.7605a2b1e9a6e725f8fa2d95e4e17c44ffec82ce: . I have an offer for you.
textByHash.21b3ee86fc65db8f268ce47bb223bf0e02028495: You have something that my mistress wants. Give it to me and you will be rewarded.
textByHash.168bb836daa88d23b284f653aac86b769308cc82: I think you know what happens if you refuse.
textByHash.fabd54396553cce526384d4f488cc1f9c1d28e31: It's the only offer you have. Now make your choice.
textByHash.d23fe57f2342a86842053b0083707a1baea41ac9: Unlikely. You have displayed moderate skill at best.
textByHash.c44dc0fd7313d5601a540d5a4ad99aa837cf3d94: Correct. You are left with two options.
textByHash.6cb34f92cfe46f389adf0968821ec4fa387b8f0e: If you wish, I will allow you to accept your defeat and walk away.
textByHash.386e64a38c7a730fc8061539468e6d66f54cc1ac: I have gone too long without a worthy challenger. You say I underestimated you? Prove it. Show me a true fight.
textByHash.5b251a8b2c7c7c9acba6c99fc685754c6bded67a: Look at this place... It's beautiful, is it not?
textByHash.ab2fe464f42769000eb20c80166099e9b1f4fa69: Amlodd? A curious name... Why do you ask?
textByHash.f8e0858b4fbb894483e959aada3ce07317d5a8c5: I have a question for you. This valley before us, how would you describe it?
textByHash.68ea1aa80ed2c68902beee88ae12c799b044ac60: Yes... It's nice to look upon such beauty, it reminds me of my home. The crystal spires of Prifddinas.
textByHash.6727d1d87e3c0d21766669add8a10307c052246d: Yes... This world... it's so peaceful, so beautiful. But there is still danger here. It takes me back to the forests near my home, before Lord Iorwerth brought a different danger upon us.
textByHash.dfc8f7831979c207d7990be0ec14efe91687e79b: Yes... It is a welcome break from the wars of my home, the wars of Lord Iorwerth.
textByHash.db4244534eb3b6123266fa4c51c7a334c438bc44: I suppose it can seem that way. Little to see and little to do. But there is beauty in that simplicity, much like the forest of Isafdar.
textByHash.2e80f865cb834dd02944e286de7ef6bdeb338796: The answers are not always easy to find. I have had time to reflect here, to consider this world. Maybe you need more time to find your own answer. Alas, it is time we do not have, for Lord Iorwerth awaits.
textByHash.8a93311ba953a3ea1497f18640a51b80a89e833b: You have something that I want!
textByHash.7d7d54c7a6b671d85bcd30eff280b0518cfb247c: Not who you expected? Give me the medallion!
textByHash.fac8ff6cea66dda92cc58ee235f0c7d5bf6baa99: You can't dismiss me! Give me the medallion!
textByHash.959995bc81d82e4bcfc9f437714ffcbc65c49213: Enough of this! Give me the medallion!
textByHash.7fd14456e073d5f3c61ff7b402fd460a86d2844a: Welcome home. Now, give me the medallion!
textByHash.5ae654d4ac8d40bc30af03b42ae6f031004bffe1: Nice house. Now, give me the medallion!
textByHash.30363bb9f8d9fb27105b2df5e580f1e99f1bbdb5: Welcome back. Now, give me the medallion!
textByHash.5c54bacea65ec7f8fcd13cab5bd2044a1a91d0e1: I'm still here! Now give me the medallion!
textByHash.6fde10938adcdabd8ca91bc27b9e9145601d19a6: Going somewhere? We have unfinished business!
textByHash.a247d7be0efeae5269ad9dd39d11c876bbd3741b: Come on! Show me a challenge!
textByHash.ee2772536c4d9078a6dab91e0507e3034cfccdb6: You can do better than that!
textByHash.bd7f9c7a17f4f14485cd6ac02d5bd23ac45b9e2b: Is that all you have to give?!
textByHash.558a1aab18ada312a64eaf5852a6bfa3db2537f1: I don't know how you lasted this long!
textByHash.7a56e3fabf9388318ae1e82b8b42f212d159262c: Yes! Show me what you've got!
